title: saccharum formosanum
intro: Saccharum formosanum, also known as Taiwanese sugarcane, is a species of grass belonging to the sugarcane genus. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Taiwanese sugarcane has been used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
